name: you-need-a-budget-ynab
description: Reads YNAB budgets, accounts, categories, payees, months, transactions, and scheduled transactions, and writes transaction/account/category/payee/scheduled-transaction mutations through the YNAB REST API.

risk.read: external YNAB API read of budget, account, category, payee, month, transaction, and scheduled-transaction data
risk.write: external mutation: creates/updates/deletes budget transactions, creates accounts/categories/payees/scheduled transactions, updates category names/goals and month-category budgeted amounts
risk.approval: required for all write actions; reads require none
